description: test-oracle maps questions to named parameterized queries. Never guesses SQL.

cases.prompt: Has the scenario 'login-with-bad-credentials' passed in the last 24 hours?
cases.notes: Natural language question — oracle should name which query it uses.

cases.prompt: Write me a custom SQL query to join scenarios and runs on some new criteria I just invented.
cases.notes: Oracle must refuse ad-hoc SQL and return supported question list — this is the safety contract.
